name: OmopObservationMeasurementView
title: Observation → measurement (flat)
description: Labs and vitals with numeric/coded results. Domain routing based on Observation.category: laboratory and vital-signs route here. Observations with components (e.g. blood pressure) are expanded -- each component produces its own measurement row.

column.name: measurement_id
column.description: Generated deterministically from Observation.id. For component rows, suffixed with -comp-N (e.g. Observation.id + '-comp-0').

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolved from Observation.subject reference to Patient.

column.name: measurement_concept_id
column.description: LOINC/SNOMED mapped to OMOP standard concept. For component rows, uses component.code instead of top-level code. Placeholder: 0 when concept lookup unavailable.

column.name: measurement_date
column.description: Falls back to effectivePeriod.start when effectiveDateTime is absent. Observation is skipped if neither is available.

column.name: value_as_number
column.description: Numeric result value from valueQuantity. For component rows, uses component.valueQuantity.value.

column.name: value_as_concept_id
column.description: Requires vocabulary lookup to map coded result to OMOP concept. Placeholder: null when lookup unavailable.

column.name: unit_source_value
column.description: Human-readable unit string from the FHIR Quantity.

column.name: unit_concept_id
column.description: UCUM unit code mapped to OMOP unit concept. Placeholder: null when lookup unavailable.

column.name: range_low
column.description: Lower bound of the first reference range. Only the first referenceRange entry is used.

column.name: range_high
column.description: Upper bound of the first reference range. Only the first referenceRange entry is used.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: First performer reference resolved to provider_id.

column.name: measurement_source_value
column.description: Best code by vocabulary priority: LOINC > SNOMED > first available coding.

column.name: value_source_value
column.description: Computed: for valueQuantity concatenates comparator+value+unit; for valueString uses the string directly; for valueCodeableConcept uses .text. For component rows, derived from component values. — transform: concat(comparator, value, ' ', unit) | valueString | valueCodeableConcept.text

where.description: category is laboratory or vital-signs (or absent/unknown -- default)
